---
title: "talk with mentor"
author: "Anjani Nandan"
date: "2026-05-12"
categories: [news, code, analysis]
image: "image.jpg"
---

I learned how to use quarto+netlify.

![](image.jpg)

I integrate with github and website is hosted on the netlify. Quarto is a tool that converts the `.qmd` file into `html`.
